rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Imprimerie nationale, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

crm:E52_Time-span.crm:P78_is_identified_by: በ፷፻፡ ወ፱፻፡ ፴ወ፪፡ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ በሐሳበ፡ ሮማዊያን፡
በ፷፻፡ ወ፱፻፡ ፴ወ፪፡ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ በሐሳበ፡ ሮማዊያን፡

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Three excerpts of Gregory of Nazianzus
Five excerpts from John Chrysostomos (the two last ones given according to quotations by Cyril)
An excerpt from Athanasius according a quotation by Cyril
እምቃል፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ይብሉ፡ ንዔሪ፡ ሥጋ፡
First two chapters of the Expicatio duodecim capitum
